languages.text:
{n}Вы слышите мужской голос, в котором невозможно уловить ни тени чувства.{/n}
"Вы абсолютно правы, заблудшее дитя. Себериан предал свою династию, и Бог-Император уже вынес ему приговор. Ему не стоит ожидать милосердия, как и вам."

traits.locale_text:
{n}Вы слышите мужской голос, в котором невозможно уловить ни тени чувства.{/n}
"Вы абсолютно правы, заблудшее дитя. Себериан предал свою династию, и Бог-Император уже вынес ему приговор. Ему не стоит ожидать милосердия, как и вам."

languages.text:
{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."
languages.original_text:
{n}Вы слышите мужской голос, в котором невозможно уловить ни тени чувства.{/n}
"Вы абсолютно правы, заблудшее дитя. Себериан предал свою династию, и Бог-Император уже вынес ему приговор. Ему не стоит ожидать милосердия, как и вам."

traits.locale_text:
{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."

{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."

{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."

languages.text:
{n}你听到一个男人的声音，但从中觉察不到一丝人类的情感。{/n}
“你说得完全正确，迷途的孩子。塞贝里安背叛了他的王朝，神皇已对他降下判决。他休想得到怜悯，你也一样。”
languages.original_text:
{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."

traits.locale_text:
{n}你听到一个男人的声音，但从中觉察不到一丝人类的情感。{/n}
“你说得完全正确，迷途的孩子。塞贝里安背叛了他的王朝，神皇已对他降下判决。他休想得到怜悯，你也一样。”

languages.text:
{n}Vous entendez une voix d'homme qui semble totalement dépourvue d'émotions humaines.{/n}
« Vous avez parfaitement raison, mon enfant {mf|égaré|égarée}. Seberian a trahi sa dynastie, un crime sur lequel l'Empereur-Dieu a déjà rendu son jugement. La sentence sera sans appel, pour lui comme pour vous. »
languages.original_text:
{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."

traits.locale_text:
{n}Vous entendez une voix d'homme qui semble totalement dépourvue d'émotions humaines.{/n}
« Vous avez parfaitement raison, mon enfant {mf|égaré|égarée}. Seberian a trahi sa dynastie, un crime sur lequel l'Empereur-Dieu a déjà rendu son jugement. La sentence sera sans appel, pour lui comme pour vous. »

languages.text: {n}Bir erkek sesi duyuyorsun. Bu seste insani hiçbir duygunun izine rastlanmıyor.{/n} "Kesinlikle haklısın kayıp çocuk. Seberian, hanedanlığına ihanet etti. Tanrı İmparator onun hakkında kararını çoktan verdi. O kimseden merhamet beklememeli, sen de bekleme."
languages.original_text:
{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir erkek sesi duyuyorsun. Bu seste insani hiçbir duygunun izine rastlanmıyor.{/n} "Kesinlikle haklısın kayıp çocuk. Seberian, hanedanlığına ihanet etti. Tanrı İmparator onun hakkında kararını çoktan verdi. O kimseden merhamet beklememeli, sen de bekleme."

languages.text:
{n}Oyes una voz de hombre, pero no notas ni rastro de emoción humana en ella.{/n}
«Tienes toda la razón, oveja descarriada. Seberian ha traicionado a la dinastía y el Dios Emperador ya lo ha juzgado. No puede esperar clemencia, ni tú tampoco».
languages.original_text:
{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."

traits.locale_text:
{n}Oyes una voz de hombre, pero no notas ni rastro de emoción humana en ella.{/n}
«Tienes toda la razón, oveja descarriada. Seberian ha traicionado a la dinastía y el Dios Emperador ya lo ha juzgado. No puede esperar clemencia, ni tú tampoco».

languages.text:
{n}Du hörst eine männliche Stimme ohne jedes menschliche Gefühl.{/n}
"Ihr habt absolut recht, verlorenes Kind. Seberian hat seine Dynastie verraten und der Gottimperator hat bereits ein Urteil über ihn gefällt. Er sollte keine Gnade erwarten, genau wie Ihr."
languages.original_text:
{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."

traits.locale_text:
{n}Du hörst eine männliche Stimme ohne jedes menschliche Gefühl.{/n}
"Ihr habt absolut recht, verlorenes Kind. Seberian hat seine Dynastie verraten und der Gottimperator hat bereits ein Urteil über ihn gefällt. Er sollte keine Gnade erwarten, genau wie Ihr."

languages.text:
{n}男の声が聞こえるが、人の感情の痕跡は全く感じられない。{/n}
「あなたは正しく言った、迷い子。シベリアは自分の王朝を裏切った。神皇帝はすでに彼に裁きを下した。彼は慈悲を期待するべきではない。そして、君も同様だ。」
languages.original_text:
{n}You hear a male voice, but you detect no trace of human feeling in it.{/n}
"You are absolutely right, lost child. Seberian has betrayed his dynasty, and the God-Emperor has already passed judgement on him. He should expect no mercy, and neither should you."

{n}男の声が聞こえるが、人の感情の痕跡は全く感じられない。{/n}
「あなたは正しく言った、迷い子。シベリアは自分の王朝を裏切った。神皇帝はすでに彼に裁きを下した。彼は慈悲を期待するべきではない。そして、君も同様だ。」
